title: Spork
body:
## Description
A performant, vanilla+ modpack intended for myself and friends, though you're welcome to do with this modpack as you like.
## Visuals
- Bare Bones
- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
- Eating Animation
- Fresh Animations
- Compatibility Patches for Bare Bones, Fresh Animations, Waystones, inmis & Universal Ores
- Better Ladders
- Default Dark Mode
- First-person Model
- Particle Tweaks
- Visuality
- Not Enough Animations
## World Gen
- Better End
- Better Nether
- Universal Ores
- Geophilic
- Repurposed Structures
- Waystones
- YUNG's Mods
## Combat
- Better Combat
- Simply Swords
- Knaves' Needs
## Quality of Life
- Diggus Maximus
- Wool Tweaks
- Torches 'n' Trinkets
- RightClickHarvest
- Only Excavators & Only Hammers
- MasterCutter
- FullGrownCropMarker
- ... and much more.
## Optimization
- Sodium
- Noxesium
- C2ME
- Clumps
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Entity Culling
- FerriteCore
- Let Me Despawn
- Lithium
- Memory Leak Fix
- Packet Fixer
- Noisium
- ModernFix
- Sodium Extra
- StutterFix
- Video Tape
